results.title: Ketan Murder Case: Scooter Used in Ketan Murder Recovered by Pune Police
results.description: Pune Police has recovered the scooter allegedly used by accused Chetan Chaudhary in the Ketan murder case. According to investigators, Chetan rode the scooter from Pune to Lohagad Fort in Lonavala on June 18, where Ketan was allegedly lured and pushed into a gorge as part of a planned murder conspiracy involving co-accused Siya. Police have identified the vehicle as a key piece of evidence in the investigation. Officers have also seized the hoodie Chetan allegedly wore during the crime in an attempt to conceal his identity. Investigators believe the scooter was used to travel nearly 60 km to the crime scene, helping reconstruct the sequence of events. The recovery of the scooter and other evidence is expected to strengthen the prosecution's case as the investigation continues.

results.title: EMRS Tier 2 Result 2026 for TGT, PGT, Hostel Warden & Other Posts
results.description: EMRS Tier 2 Result 2026 and Score Card for TGT, PGT, Hostel Warden & Other Posts will to be out in July 2026. The result is activated at https://nests.tribal.gov.in/ and candidates need their login details to check their qualifying status in exam.

results.title: R Madhavan has '0% spine, 100% bootlicking', netizens slams for saying PM Narendra Modi 'sirf desh ke baare mein sochte hai': Viral video
results.description: After Suniel Shetty gets brutally trolled for over-praising PM Narendra Modi, netizens found an old interview of R Madhavan where he asserted that Modi thinks about India all the time.

results.title: Kidambi Srikanth's First Final in Seven Months Ends in Heartbreak at US Open
results.description: Kidambi Srikanth's impressive run at the US Open ended in another runner-up finish as China's Su Li Yang outclassed the Indian in the men's singles final.

results.title: Thinking about pregnancy after 30? You should first undergo fertility evalutation
results.description: Fertility declines with age, but doctors say the right time for a fertility evaluation depends on age, health and medical history. Gynaecologist shares that early assessment can help couples understand their reproductive health and treatment options.
